channel.title: apophenia.news
channel.description: Signals, anomalies, civilization trajectories, and deep pattern analysis.

item.title: Rubio Overtakes Vance: The Kalshi Signal Nobody on Polymarket Sees
item.description: Marco Rubio just became the highest-priced candidate to win the 2028 presidency on Kalshi — while JD Vance still leads Polymarket. The split between two markets, and the rumors that Vance may not run at all, tell a story the polls can't.

item.title: AGI → Immortality → Everything Else
item.description: Why immortality is the inevitable second step after AGI — and why any alien civilization that reaches us has already solved death.

item.title: When Aliens Arrive, They Already Know What You're Thinking
item.description: Why any sufficiently advanced civilization will have inevitably developed telepathy — and what that means for every reported alien encounter in history.
